content.text:
The user is asking "你是什么模型" which means "What model are you?" in Chinese. They want to know which AI model I am.

According to the system prompt, I'm powered by the model glm-4.7. Let me respond to their question.

I'm currently using **GLM-4.7**.

根据环境信息，我使用的是 GLM-4.7 模型。
